The '''Incom Factory''' was located on an unknown planet, presumably in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. [[Vors Voorhorian]], the designer of the [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]], used it as a place to house false shells of ships, to mislead the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

==Appearances==
